title: Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a font designer in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan struggling to sell your digital products online due to PayPal's restrictions in your country? You're not alone. Many creators face similar challenges with Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip. But there's a better way. One that's fast, secure, and fully automated. Let's explore your options and find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are well-known platforms for selling digital products, but they come with significant restrictions. PayPal, for instance, is not available in many countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe has a limited list of supported countries, and Gumroad has a long list of blocked countries. These restrictions can leave you without a way to sell your fonts online. On the other hand, services like NOWPayments and cryptocurrency payment processors offer a more open and accessible solution. They allow you to accept payments in various cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies, without the need for a traditional payment processor account.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, traditional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad can be quite restrictive. They often require you to apply for a special account or provide additional documentation, which can be time-consuming and may not even be approved. In contrast, cryptocurrency payment processors and NOWPayments have a more open approach. They don't require KYC verification, and you can start accepting payments immediately. This means you can focus on selling your fonts, without the hassle of dealing with restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, traditional payment processors can be quite steep. PayPal, for example, charges a 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction fee, which can add up quickly. Stripe and Gumroad also have similar fees. On the other hand, cryptocurrency payment processors and NOWPayments have significantly lower fees, ranging from 0.5% to 1.5% per transaction. This means you can keep more of your hard-earned income, and focus on growing your business.
Traditional payment processors can cost you up to 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is best for you? If you're a font designer in a restricted country, a cryptocurrency payment processor or NOWPayments might be the way to go. They offer a more open and accessible solution, with lower fees and automated delivery capabilities. However, if you're looking for a complete store infrastructure, including payment processing, delivery, and analytics, consider the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99). This comprehensive solution provides everything you need to sell your fonts online, without the hassle of dealing with restricted countries or traditional payment processors.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Cryptocurrency payment processors and NOWPayments have fees as low as 0.5% per transaction.
